summary: Script lacks Set-StrictMode; workflow actions not pinned to SHA (security issue). Parse-JUnitXml XPath //testsuite could match nested elements incorrectly. Code repetition: both "Run aggregator" and "Generate markdown" steps source script (lines 23-25, 30-32). JSON parsing doesn't validate structure before accessing properties. Workflow hard-codes ./fixtures path without existence checks. Good modularity and readability offset by missing defensive programming and security gaps.
